evals.prompt: 帮我创建一个 Python CLI 项目，叫 todo-tracker，用来管理我的待办事项。
evals.expected_output: Creates a todo-tracker project with CLI type template: pyproject.toml with click dependency and scripts entry point, src/todo_tracker/cli.py with click commands, tests/test_cli.py with CliRunner tests, .gitignore, README.md, .env.example. Runs uv sync and git init with initial commit.

assertions.assertion: pyproject.toml includes click as a dependency
src/todo_tracker/cli.py defines a click CLI with commands
Git repository initialized with at least one commit

evals.prompt: I need to build a FastAPI backend for a note-taking app called note-api. Can you scaffold the project?
evals.expected_output: Creates a note-api project with Web type template: pyproject.toml with fastapi/uvicorn/pydantic-settings dependencies, src/note_api/app.py with FastAPI app factory and lifespan, src/note_api/config.py with pydantic-settings, src/note_api/routes/health.py with health endpoint, tests/conftest.py with TestClient fixture, tests/test_health.py. Runs uv sync and git init.

assertions.assertion: pyproject.toml includes fastapi as a dependency
pyproject.toml includes pydantic-settings as a dependency
src/note_api/app.py defines a FastAPI app factory

evals.prompt: 搭建一个 Python 库项目叫 text-utils，提供文本处理的工具函数。
evals.expected_output: Creates a text-utils project with Lib type template: pyproject.toml with no runtime dependencies, src/text_utils/__init__.py with __all__ exports, src/text_utils/core.py with greet function, tests/test_core.py with basic unit tests. Runs uv sync and git init.

assertions.assertion: pyproject.toml has no runtime dependencies beyond dev-only tools
